senses.gloss_en_full: To engage in physical activity to improve performance; to practice.

To optimize the coordinated interaction of components.

senses.gloss_en_full: To groom by trimming or removing hair from specific areas of a dog's coat.

senses.gloss_en_full: To deliberately give something a particular appearance or meaning.
